tweet.text: Hate to see you go my brother! Packers got a good one man! On the field and off!! @malikwillis https://t.co/uxH6jX7vG4
Nothing like being able to see the best fans in college football, the night before they get rowdy on Game Day!! Can’t wait to see you guys Tomorrow night! #HailState https://t.co/OODnAi8COA
The only prescription is MORE COWBELLS!!! #HailState https://t.co/yTlgkVXW9R
The energy is different in Starkvegas. I’m trying to tell you! Love the culture that Coach Lebby has built and continues to build!
Yooooo so no flag on Kirby for pushing a player? @NCAAFootball come on now
